title: enhanced crafting table
description: This resource pack makes crafting tables SHINY and POLISHED and NEW
body:
# ENHANCED CRAFTING TABLES
This pack makes Crafting Tables look MUCH more shinier, newer, polished, and maintains the vanilla feel and it looks like it came from a 2024 update instead of a 2010 update.
![The table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65d38459f84e4a1814ef79f0c7415d2e4fe3241f.png)

This resource pack is available on versions 1.13.x to 1.21x.
